Entry.JapaneseText: 疲れた体に染み渡る、このコーヒーの苦味……。 ブリリアントな午後のひと時、一服の清涼剤、か……
Entry.EnglishText: The bitterness of this coffee permeates my own being. A brilliant short cup in the afternoon...

Entry.JapaneseText: 私の体についた無数の傷……旅の激しさを物語るが 心についた傷に比べれば、こんなものは落書きと同じ
Entry.EnglishText: My body has numerous scratches...But if you compare that with what my heart has gained in this travel, it's nothing but scribbles.

Entry.JapaneseText: 癒される事のない心の傷は、誰が治してくれるのか。 まだ見ぬ、私の想いの人よ……君はどこに……
Entry.EnglishText: The one who could heal this wounded irrepairable heart, is you whom I've given it to...wherever you are...

Entry.JapaneseText: ガラスのハートが砕ける前に、恋という名の炎で 新たな息吹を与えてくれるのだろうか？ あぁ……
Entry.EnglishText: Will you temper my heart once more with the fire of love before it fully crumbles to pieces? Hah...
Entry.Notes: Get it coz fire tempers glass--

Entry.JapaneseText: やーっぱ、無理だ、おらには、できね。 高い金払ったセミナーだったが、全く、ありゃ詐欺だ
Entry.EnglishText: Yeah, no. This isn't working at all. I already went to that seminar, but I guess it's just a scam.

Entry.JapaneseText: なーにが、シャイな男が大うけだ！ このままが一番！ 素のおらが、一番格好ええだーよ
Entry.EnglishText: So much "shy men get into women's hearts faster", pweh! I'm waay cooler the way I am!
